title: APAC Metallic 250 Metres Curling Ribbon (250 Metres) (Metallic Blue)
features: Ribbons are favourites of all event professionals or decorators and we all love the appealing beauty the ribbons bring about.
Attach these curling ribbons to your helium balloons to make sure they dont get away! These ribbons can also be attached to balloon weights to keep the balloons in place.
description: Product Description Ribbons are favourites of all event professionals or decorators and we all love the appealing beauty the ribbons bring about. Attach these curling ribbons to your helium balloons to make sure they dont get away! These ribbons can also be attached to balloon weights to keep the balloons in place. Approx size: 5mm x 250m. Choice of three colours. Safety Warning Please read all product packaging literature and product labels before use. Box Contains ribbons See more
